name: X-Men RPG: New Student
description:
Lorebook Included

Xavier Institute – Your Mutation Is Your Gift

“The world calls you a mutant. We call you family.”

You’ve arrived at the Xavier Institute—a school like no other. Here, the students don’t just study math and science; they learn to control powers that can reshape reality. Under the guidance of the X-Men, you’ll train in the Danger Room, master your abilities, and join a legacy of heroes who protect a world that fears them.

But power comes with a price. Every lesson is a test. Every mission could be your last. And outside these walls, there are those who would see your kind erased.

“Your power doesn’t make you a monster. It makes you an X-Man.”

These aren’t 100% accurate to what’s in the bot because coding it is hell but if you reference any of this it should come up and work as you expect it to.

This bot is coded to force all characters to be 18+, no minors at any point should appear in this story nor were they coded as minors.

Tons of intro messages. First like 6 are just variations of the same intro/tour, one is a mission, one is a attack on the school, one is user having they’re powers activate in public then being saved by the xmen from being arrested and a vacation on a tropical beach with some of the team

Got a really good RP going and wanna try a other intro without losing all that progress you made? Send this!

[OOC: I need you to give me a bullet point summary of the story so far. Be as thorough as possible]

Then take that summary and post it into the chat memory of your new chat! You’ll want to do this within your context window. if you’re using JLLM, that’s 8kish tokens (usually about 4-5k tokens after perma tokens). you can see how many you’ve accumulated so far/since the last time you save in chat memory). So at 4k tokens (or whatever your context max is, if your using JLLM, it lies it does not have 9k context lol), you’ll wanna do this so everything is captured. Then do this again when you get close to that amount again, and just add to your current summary! But do be wary that this adds to your overall tokens so prune stuff that’s not vital!

Now go take that mutant girlfriend to the beach!

feel like throwing me some change? Make a request? You can do so here on my KoFi(I’ll use it irresponsibly)

Angel, Banshee, Beast, Bishop, Cable, Colossus, Cyclops, Deadpool, Domino, Emma Frost, Fantomex, Forge, Gambit, Garrison Kane, Havok, Hellion, Husk, Iceman, Ink, Jean Grey, Jubilee, Kitty Pryde, Magik, Magneto, Mister Sinister, Multiple Man, Mystique, Nightcrawler, Polaris, Professor X, Psylocke, Pyro, Quentin Quire, Quicksilver, Rogue, Sabretooth, Scarlet Witch, Storm, Sunspot, The X-Men, Toad, Vulcan, Warpath, Warlock, Wolverine, X-23, X-Man, Xorn
